1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 1km grid cells (id and geom) from the national grid

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) for the national layer

4.description: filter grid cells to those within Kristiansand municipality (grid ∩ kommune)

5.description: find grid cells (already limited to municipality) that intersect 200-year storm-surge polygons

6.description: count distinct 1km grid cell ids that intersect the 200-year storm-surge areas in Kristiansand

1.sql: SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand%';

2.sql: SELECT id, objid, ssbid1000m, shape_area, ST_SRID(geom) AS srid FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km LIMIT 1;

3.sql: SELECT objid, objtype, lokalid, oppdateringsdato, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna LIMIT 1;

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and bounding box

2.description: get 1km grid cells intersecting the municipality bbox (prefilter)

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons intersecting the municipality bbox (prefilter)

4.description: find grid cells that intersect the storm-surge polygons (intersects)

5.description: collapse to one row per grid cell (unique grid ids)

6.description: count unique grid cells that intersect storm-surge areas

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid,
  ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin,
  ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, objid, ssbid1000m, shape_area, ST_SRID(geom) AS srid, geom
FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km
WHERE geom && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833);

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, objtype, lokalid, oppdateringsdato, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE omrade && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833);

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: aggregate
-- source_step: 4
-- aggregation_type: "min"
-- group_by: ["objid_left"]
-- metric_column: "objid_right"
-- metric_as: "min_objid_right"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: aggregate
-- source_step: 5
-- aggregation_type: "count"
-- metric_as: "count"
